meta_title: For Students: design with AI to Solve can't debug code (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Students: Design with AI to Solve Debugging Roadblocks
content.seo_description: Learn how to design with AI and overcome debugging hurdles. A beginner-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate your coding journey.
content.answer_block: When code won't run, stop staring at syntax errors. Use AI-driven architectural design to map your logic flows before coding. By leveraging Antigravity for structural planning and Claude Code for iterative debugging, you transform debugging from a frustrating trial-and-error process into a systematic, high-velocity engineering workflow.
content.intro:
The screen glows, the cursor blinks, and your terminal is a graveyard of stack traces. You feel the familiar weight of 'can't debug code'—that crushing realization that your logic has hit a wall you don't know how to climb. It is the rite of passage every senior engineer endured, yet it feels like a personal failure when you are just starting your journey.

But here is the secret: coding isn't just about typing syntax; it is about architectural design. By shifting your perspective from 'fixing lines' to 'designing systems with AI,' you gain a superpower that turns bugs into learning milestones. Stop fighting the computer and start orchestrating your build with the precision of a professional.

steps.title: Map the Logical Flow
steps.description: Before writing code, visualize the data architecture. This prevents structural bugs before they manifest.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a high-level architectural diagram for a [Project Name] that handles [Key Feature]. Focus on state management and data flow.
steps.claude_code_command: claude ask 'Review this architecture for potential failure points in the state management logic.'

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Don't debug the whole file. Use AI to pinpoint the exact function causing the regression.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this code block and identify the specific line causing the runtime error in the [Function Name].
steps.claude_code_command: claude terminal 'grep -r "error" . | head -n 5' then 'claude explain the context of this error'

steps.title: Refactor for Readability
steps.description: Complexity is the enemy of stability. Simplify your functions so AI can reason through them more effectively.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this function to follow clean code principles, reducing cyclomatic complexity while maintaining functionality.

steps.title: Implement Defensive Assertions
steps.description: Add code that fails loudly. This makes debugging trivial in the future.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Suggest robust error handling and input validation assertions for this specific module.

steps.title: Automate the Feedback Loop
steps.description: Connect your code to Claude Code to run continuous checks during your development session.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a watch-script that triggers a linting and unit test suite whenever I save my main project file.

pro_tips: Always provide the error stack trace to the AI as a raw string; do not summarize it yourself, as you might miss the crucial detail.
Ask the AI to explain 'why' a fix works rather than just applying it; this builds your mental model for future debugging.
Use 'Rubber Ducking' with Claude: explain your code line-by-line to the AI, and it will often catch your logic gaps before you do.
Keep your context window clean by deleting old, irrelevant file references in your AI chat sessions to reduce hallucination.
Treat AI as a junior pair programmer, not a magic wand; review every line of suggested code as if you were the one responsible for it.
content.next_steps: Once you have successfully debugged your first module, move to integrating a database or an external API. Apply these same AI-assisted design principles to ensure your new features remain modular and testable.
content.conversion_block: You have the tools and the framework to move past the roadblocks that stop most students from finishing their portfolios. Stop debugging alone and start building with an intelligent edge. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
